summary: Testing iteration 24 - Verified 4-tier payment system, campaign settings bug fix, and promo code functionality. 18/18 backend tests pass, 15/15 pricing frontend tests pass. One BUG found: PricingPage calls wrong promo code endpoint.

ui_bugs.issue: Promo code apply calls wrong endpoint - uses /api/subscription/apply-promo but backend expects /api/promo-codes/apply

breakdown.backend/test_subscription.py: 18 passed - 4-tier pricing structure (Free, Hero $3.99, Quest Master $3.99, Legendary $5.99) verified, subscription status, promo code auth, checkout endpoints, campaign settings save
breakdown.subscription-pricing.spec.ts: 15 passed - All 4 pricing tiers display correctly, monthly/yearly toggle, promo code UI, subscribe buttons, referral section

action_items: FIX BUG: PricingPage.js line 97 - change /api/subscription/apply-promo to /api/promo-codes/apply
The campaign-flows.spec.ts tests are outdated - they expect /campaigns route but app now uses /home. Update tests or mark as low priority since pricing tests cover the main flows.
seed_data_creation: Tests use dynamic test user registration with unique emails
context_for_next_testing_agent: 4-tier pricing system verified: Free ($0), Hero/Player ($3.99 blue), Quest Master/GM ($3.99 red), Legendary ($5.99 gold). Campaign settings bug fix verified via backend tests (campaign_id now set on upsert). Promo code apply endpoint mismatch is the only open bug.

subscription_plans_4_tiers.description: API returns 4 plans with correct IDs (free, player, gm, legendary), names, and pricing

free_plan.description: Free plan: $0, 1 character, can't create campaigns, 3 AI calls/month

hero_player_plan.description: Hero plan: $3.99/month ($39.99/year), unlimited characters, 50 AI calls, blue theme

quest_master_gm_plan.description: Quest Master plan: $3.99/month ($39.99/year), unlimited campaigns, unlimited AI, red theme

legendary_plan.description: Legendary plan: $5.99/month ($59.99/year), MOST POPULAR badge, gold theme, everything included

checkout_session.description: Stripe checkout session creation works for paid plans, returns checkout_url and session_id

promo_code_creation_admin.description: Promo code creation requires admin (username=RookieQuestAdmin), returns 403 for regular users

promo_code_apply.description: Backend endpoint /api/promo-codes/apply works, but PricingPage calls wrong endpoint /api/subscription/apply-promo

campaign_settings_save.description: Campaign settings save correctly with $setOnInsert fix - campaign_id is now set on upsert

pricing_page_ui.description: All 4 plan cards display with correct pricing, features, monthly/yearly toggle, and subscribe buttons
